title: eriosorus aureonitens
intro: Eriosorus aureonitens is a plant species also known as the "gold-back saxicolous rosset" or "rosulate saxicolous rosset", belonging to the Saxifragaceae family. Traditionally, Eriosorus aureonitens has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and acting as a natural antiseptic. Eriosorus aureonitens is typically prepared as a tincture or tea by herbalists, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
